narrative_proof_records.reader_question: What is Vulca and what concrete product output does this deck demonstrate?
narrative_proof_records.required_answer: Vulca turns a real commercial brief plus selected source data into a code-generated editable PPT deck with traceable proof.
narrative_proof_records.business_action: Position the product as an evidence-to-editable-PPT workflow.
narrative_proof_records.public_takeaway: A real brief becomes editable PPT proof.

proof_payload.product_mechanism: brief, source pack, memory, code, and PPT output are shown as one native product path
proof_payload.business_consequence: buyers can judge a repeatable workflow instead of a one-off pretty slide
proof_payload.after_state: editable PPT generated from selected case data
proof_payload.what_the_viewer_should_notice: the main visual object demonstrates the business action before small labels are read

copy_units.headline: A real brief becomes editable PPT proof.

buyers can judge a repeatable workflow instead of a one-off pretty slide

public_proof_replacement.replacement_rule: render a native editable proxy that shows the product action without copying source visuals or leaking raw trace

narrative_proof_records.reader_question: How does Vulca transform raw business and tutorial material into design instructions?
narrative_proof_records.required_answer: The system selects allowed source records, extracts design rules, creates capability memory, and resolves slide contracts before native drawing.
narrative_proof_records.business_action: Stage the data-to-memory compiler as the product's first operating step.
narrative_proof_records.public_takeaway: Sources become design decisions before drawing.

proof_payload.product_mechanism: tutorial, case, and multimodal records are reduced into explicit memory and gate objects
proof_payload.business_consequence: the deck can explain why a visual decision was chosen

proof_payload.after_state: source rules are compiled into selectable memory
proof_payload.what_the_viewer_should_notice: the main visual object demonstrates the business action before small labels are read

narrative_proof_records.reader_question: Why is this different from prompt-only, image-only, template, design-editor, or office-copilot slide creation?
narrative_proof_records.required_answer: Vulca binds usecase data, design memory, layout capacity, text sockets, and QA gates before generating editable PPT objects.
narrative_proof_records.business_action: Show the competitor path breaking at the missing compiler turn.
narrative_proof_records.public_takeaway: The difference is mechanism, not taste.

proof_payload.product_mechanism: the prompt-only path lacks source memory, carrier selection, and socket-bound copy
proof_payload.business_consequence: the buyer sees a system boundary rather than a subjective style comparison
proof_payload.after_state: source-bound generated PPT with visible decision route
proof_payload.what_the_viewer_should_notice: the main visual object demonstrates the business action before small labels are read

narrative_proof_records.reader_question: How do we know the product really used the data and workflow instead of producing another direct deck?
